# mrclean test fixture — synthetic invalid value for detection pattern testing
# Source: PKCS#8 Private Key PEM format — BEGIN/END PRIVATE KEY markers with base64 body
# Checksum-flip: base64 body is placeholder padding that does not decode to a real key
# License: test fixture only — not a real credential

The service uses the following private key for JWT signing:
-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----
MIIEvAIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKYwggSiAgEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
-----END PRIVATE KEY-----
